findings: Smoke coverage verifies result completion and metaswarm structure, but not explicit stuck-detector signaling.
Stop and teardown behavior are only exercised through best-effort tmux cleanup, without assertions on cleanup outcomes.
Restart semantics and resume-after-interruption are not tested.
Because the script uses set -euo pipefail, it aborts on first failure instead of asserting expected partial or degraded behavior.
Metaswarm smoke coverage does not simulate a stalled or failed commander or child launch.
